name: leanweb-vscode
description: Run Lean4web UI inside VS Code (desktop or web) with a remote Lean server.

leanweb.serverBaseUrl.markdownDescription: Base HTTP(S) URL of your Lean server providing /api and /websocket endpoints. If empty, will try to use the current host.

leanweb.wsBaseUrl.markdownDescription: Base WS(S) URL (optional). If empty, derived from serverBaseUrl (http->ws).
